title: pelargonium × calographicum
intro: Pelargonium × calographicum, a hybrid species of the pelargonium plant, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of citronellal, a compound that has antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × calographicum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
